mapper.update: UPDATE comment SET status = 0 WHERE content_id = #{contentId} AND status = 1

UPDATE comment SET status = 0 WHERE status = 1 AND content_id IN
#{contentId}
UPDATE comment SET status = 1 WHERE content_id = #{contentId} AND status = 0
mapper.sql: c.id, c.content_id, c.user_id, c.parent_id, c.root_id, c.content, c.like_count, c.reply_count, c.status, c.created_time, c.comment_type, c.paragraph_id, ct.title as content_title, u.nickname as user_nickname, u.avatar as user_avatar

ORDER BY
c.created_time c.like_count c.created_time
ASC DESC
c.created_time DESC
mapper.select: SELECT FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN content ct ON c.content_id = ct.id
SELECT FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN content ct ON c.content_id = ct.id WHERE c.id = #{id} AND c.status = 1 AND u.status = 1 AND ct.status = 1
SELECT FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN content ct ON c.content_id = ct.id WHERE c.id = #{id} AND u.status = 1 AND ct.status = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE comment SET status = 0 WHERE status = 1 AND (id = #{commentId} OR root_id = #{commentId} OR parent_id = #{commentId})
UPDATE comment SET status = 1 WHERE status = 0 AND (id = #{commentId} OR root_id = #{commentId} OR parent_id = #{commentId})
